  {
    "idx": 0,
    "aspects": [
      {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "Bannerlord have a style of game that could be the sweet spot between Civ style world/kingdom building with a mix of Total War battles"},
      {"aspect": "mods", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "you will absolutely need mods as the base systems and features just arent there"},
      {"aspect": "build_variety", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "you can play the game multiple different ways (Merc, Trader, Vassel, Ruler)"},
      {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The world, for the most part, moves pretty consistantly and things constantly change"},
      {"aspect": "combat", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Battles can be fun and do require some thinking"},
      {"aspect": "siege", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "Sieges are a great feature, you just lack the ability to control them well"},
      {"aspect": "ai_behavior", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "AI lords and leaders are terrible when it comes to tactics"},
      {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Dialouges are rough and uninteresting, every NPC interaction is identical and repetitive"},
      {"aspect": "persistence", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Wars are persistent and sometimes seem pointlessly invoked"},
      {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Graphics are very poor"},
      {"aspect": "town_interactivity", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "there is so much potential in the towns and villages if they were more interactive"},
      {"aspect": "hideouts", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Hideouts are bland and monotonous"}
    ]
  },
